findings.description: Automated check flagged section count 5 < source headings 12, but this is a false positive. The RST file has exactly 5 H2-level headings (using `----` underline: 概要, 特徴, 要求, 構造, テーブルを使用した採番機能), matching the 5 knowledge sections s1–s5. The count of 12 includes H3 and deeper sub-headings, which are properly merged into their parent sections.
findings.source_evidence: RST H2 headings with `----`: 概要 / 特徴 / 要求 / 構造 / テーブルを使用した採番機能 = 5 total

findings.description: Section s5 contains Java code that uses `SystemRepository` as a PascalCase class name (SystemRepository.getObject("tableIdGenerator")), but `SystemRepository` is absent from s5's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source 使用例 Java code: `IdGenerator generator = (IdGenerator) SystemRepository.getObject("tableIdGenerator");`

findings.description: Section s5 references the fully-qualified class names `nablarch.core.db.transaction.SimpleDbTransactionManager` and `nablarch.core.repository.initialization.BasicApplicationInitializer` in the XML configuration example and property tables, but only their short names appear in hints. The full package-qualified names are absent, which may reduce discoverability when users query with fully-qualified names.
